text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The New Year is here. ☆ And today's the start of
my senior year! Right, Trainer? ♪ So!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It's time to try out a different kind of feng shui to
commemorate the occasion! That's exciting,
right? Right?!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Then off we go! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey is always energetic, but this new
year, she's got even more energy to spare than
usual.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
First up is a good luck charm! Buying one before
you pray is the Rickey way. ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
That way, when you pray, you feel like your good
luck charm gets powered up too. Makes sense,
right?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Next up is learning the right way to pray! Let's
make our wishes into a thank-you sandwich!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Say thank you, make your wish, then say thank
you again. It's important you never forget to show
the gods your appreciation. ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Of course, that doesn't just go for gods, but
everyone. So thank you, Trainer! For everything
you do for me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Last is the fortune slips! You don't tie them to
anything, though—you take them home with
you. ☆ Otherwise, you might forget what they
said.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
If you hang it up in a place where it'll catch your
eye from time to time, it'll help you keep things in
perspective. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
You know... her methods sound quite practical
and effective.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After enjoying our trip to the shrine...
choice_data_list:
Hey Rickey, you seem more energetic than
usual today.

Hey Rickey, you seem more energetic than
usual today.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: You think? I don't feel any different.
choice_data_list: Are you still thinking about Hokko Tarumae?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Tarumae?! Of course not! Nope. Not at all...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The fact she's denying it so strongly has to mean
it's still on her mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hokko Tarumae told her to focus on running, and
not to go off on any feng shui-related detours.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
By the way, Trainer. The life line on my palm is
saying that this year's qi flow is in for a drastic
change.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
So how about we try grabbing onto that new
flow? We can go someplace where we can check
out the latest trends.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Well, there are all kinds of trends. Trends
in entertainment, economic trends...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
We can go with whichever you'd like. What kind
do you want to learn about?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The first thing that pops into my head is...
choice_data_list: The concerns of the rich and powerful.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Fun fashion! I think I know where to go for that!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yep, it's gotta be the shopping mall. ☆ There are
a lot of brand-name shops here, so it'll be easy to
see what colors are popular too.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Look at all the different hues! Just seeing it all is
putting me in a good mood!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hey, that outfit looks pretty nice. ♪ It's got
all my lucky colors for this year!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
That said, I can't say I'm too happy about the
price. Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I accompany Copano Rickey on a tour of the
shopping mall. It seems to put the pep back in her
step.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The rich and powerful... So it'd have to be
somewhere big shots hang out. I think I know a
place!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It's a first-rate hotel! We can get a feel for what's
trending among rich people by just looking
around the lobby.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... So the shape of that flower vase brings
good luck, huh? And the color of the flowers
seems important, too...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I think I've just freshened up my feng shui
for this year! I feel like I've really improved. ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Copano Rickey's brush with high society
has broadened her horizons.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
What's going on locally, huh? In that case, I know
a place with a great view of the town.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Whoa. It looks really windy outside today. It's like
I can literally see the qi flowing!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The westerly winds from the continent seem
strong today. Oh. If you look closely...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The buildings all have differently shaped roofs.
Some are pointed ones and some are flat. I
wonder if that has any influence on luck.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, let's go see if we can find out. Looking at
the architecture and stuff might help us learn how
to improve our luck too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After looking down from a high vantage point,
Copano Rickey makes an unexpected discovery.
She seems to have gained a new perspective.
